info.title: AB Brain - Spartan Training Platform
info.description:
AB Brain — Avi Bar's unified personal knowledge base, training intelligence, and AI coaching platform.

## How to Use This API

### Before Coaching/Training Conversations
1. Call `GET /training/injuries/active/summary` — check for contraindications FIRST
2. Call `GET /training/day/{today}` — see today's full context (workouts, nutrition, body, injuries, active plan)
3. Call `GET /training/plans?status=active` — understand the current training program

### After Coaching Conversations
1. Call `POST /training/coaching` — save the session summary with key_decisions, adjustments, injury_notes, and next_steps
2. If a new injury was discussed: `POST /training/injuries` — log it with body_area, severity, modifications
3. If the plan needs updating: `PUT /training/plans/{id}` — update phase, progression_notes, or constraints

### For Training Plan Creation
1. Review recent workouts: `GET /workouts?limit=20`
2. Review body trends: `GET /body-metrics?limit=10`
3. Check active injuries: `GET /training/injuries?status=active`
4. Create plan: `POST /training/plans` — include goal, rationale (WHY), weekly_structure, constraints

### For General Queries
- `GET /search?q=term` — full-text search across ALL data types
- `POST /search/ai` — AI-optimized search returning typed results
- `GET /dashboard` — overview stats for all tables

### For Motivation & Accountability
- `GET /gamification` — rings (Train/Execute/Recover), streaks, badges, weekly progress, smart goal suggestions
- `PUT /gamification/settings` — adjust ring goals based on user's current capacity
- Use ring data to reinforce consistency: "You've got a 12-day train streak going!"
- When suggesting goal changes, check the `suggestions` array — the system auto-recommends based on 7-day averages

### Data Types Available
Knowledge, Facts, Tasks, Projects, Transcripts, Conversations, Workouts, Meals, Body Metrics, Daily Nutrition Context, Training Plans, Coaching Sessions, Injuries, Gamification (Rings, Streaks, Badges)

get.summary: Get workout statistics — total count, by type, average effort, recent workouts

post.summary: AI-powered smart intake — auto-classifies text into knowledge, fact, task, or transcript
post.description: Send raw text and OpenAI will classify it and store it in the appropriate table automatically.

text.description: Raw text to classify and store

get.summary: Search across ALL data types (knowledge, transcripts, tasks, projects) in one query
get.description: Unified search that queries knowledge entries, transcripts, tasks, and projects simultaneously. Returns results grouped by type with relevance ranking. Use this as the primary search method.

post.summary: AI-powered search across the entire knowledge base
post.description: Submit a natural language query to search across all data types. Returns results sorted by relevance with a summary. Designed for AI agents to search and retrieve the user's personal data.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Workouts on or after this date

post.summary: Log a new Spartan workout with structured fields for type, workout details, metrics, performance, body feedback, and adjustments
post.description: Post a structured workout log. ChatGPT should use this after a workout recap conversation. Include workout_type, focus, warmup, main_sets, carries, metrics (time, distance, elevation), effort rating 1-10, performance notes (slowdown, failure point), body feedback (grip, legs, cardio, shoulder), a...

title.description: Auto-generated if empty: 'Spartan Workout – DATE – TYPE'

elevation.description: Base elevation if relevant, e.g. 1,320 ft

focus.description: Goal of the workout, e.g. hill durability, grip endurance

slowdown_notes.description: Where did I slow down or break form

failure_first.description: What failed first: legs / grip / cardio / shoulders

grip_feedback.description: Grip status: solid / pumped / gave out

cardio_feedback.description: Cardio status: steady / gasping / recovered fast

body_notes.description: Additional body feedback or recovery notes

adjustment.description: What to change next time: weight, pace, structure

get.summary: List or search body composition measurements

parameters.name: latest
parameters.description: Return only the most recent entry

200.description: Body metrics list or single latest entry

post.summary: Create a body composition measurement entry

get.summary: Get daily nutrition context (energy, sleep, hydration, cravings, etc.)

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Get context for a specific date

post.summary: Create daily nutrition context for a date

409.description: Context already exists for this date

get.summary: Get computed daily nutrition summary (aggregated from meals + context)
get.description: Returns macro totals computed from meals, merged with daily context if available. Meals listed chronologically.

200.description: Daily summary with meals and context

get.summary: Get dashboard stats (knowledge count, tasks by status, recent activity)
List or search training plans (periodized blocks, mesocycles, rehab plans)

post.summary: Create a new training plan with goals, phases, weekly structure, and rationale

get.summary: List AI coaching session summaries (injury notes, adjustments, rationale)

post.summary: Save a coaching session summary after reviewing training data with AI

get.summary: List injuries/contentions with body area, severity, and status filters

parameters.name: body_area
parameters.description: Filter by body area (e.g. shoulder, knee, lower_back)

post.summary: Log an injury or contention with symptoms, treatment, and movement modifications

put.summary: Update an injury (e.g. change status to resolved, add treatment notes)

get.summary: Get all active/monitoring injuries — use this before recommending exercises to check for contraindications

200.description: Active injuries with body areas, severity, and modifications

get.summary: Cross-reference ALL fitness data for a specific date: workouts, meals, nutrition context, body metrics, coaching sessions, active injuries, and current training plan

200.description: Complete training day view with all cross-referenced data

get.summary: Get activity rings, streaks, badges, weekly progress, and smart suggestions
get.description: Returns today's ring progress (Train/Execute/Recover), current streaks, all badges (unlocked and locked), weekly summary, nudges, and smart goal adjustment suggestions based on trailing 7-day averages. Shows current momentum and consistency.

rings.description: Today's ring progress. Train = workouts logged, Execute = tasks completed, Recover = meals + daily context logged

streaks.description: Consecutive days for each category. Perfect = all 3 rings closed.

suggestions.description: Smart goal adjustment suggestions based on trailing 7-day averages. direction=up means user is crushing it and should raise goal, direction=down means goal may be too ambitious.

put.summary: Update ring goals and notification preferences
put.description: Adjust daily ring goals (how many workouts/tasks/recovery entries to close each ring), toggle notifications, or modify the notification schedule. Goals should be adjusted based on the user's current capacity and consistency.

ring_train_goal.description: Workouts per day to close Train ring

ring_execute_goal.description: Tasks completed per day to close Execute ring

ring_recover_goal.description: Meals + daily context entries per day to close Recover ring

get.summary: Get recovery score for a specific date

200.description: Recovery score for the given date

get.summary: Get recovery trend over a number of days

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days to look back

patch.summary: Update a daily nutrition context entry

ai_source.description: AI source that created this entry

weekly_structure.description: Array of day-by-day plan: [{day: 'Monday', type: 'strength', focus: 'upper body', notes: '...'}]

rationale.description: WHY this plan was chosen — training philosophy, injury avoidance, periodization reasoning

constraints.description: Limitations: injuries, schedule, equipment, recovery needs

key_decisions.description: Key decisions made during the session

adjustments.description: Training adjustments: [{area: 'volume', change: 'reduce upper body sets by 20%', reason: 'shoulder impingement'}]

data_reviewed.description: What data was reviewed: {workouts_from: '2026-03-01', workouts_to: '2026-03-18', body_metrics: true}
